LanguageData.FB_Bulbfreak.label: fused bulbfreak
LanguageData.FB_Bulbfreak.description: A fused combat host made from a flesh-colony pawn and allied beasts. It releases the sealed host if destroyed.
LanguageData.FB_Bulbfreak.tools.0.label: tentacle
LanguageData.FB_Bulbfreak.tools.1.label: tentacle
LanguageData.FB_Bulbfreak.tools.2.label: tentacle
LanguageData.FB_Bulbfreak.tools.3.label: tentacle
LanguageData.FB_Bulbfreak.tools.4.label: tentacle
LanguageData.FB_Bulbfreak.tools.5.label: head
